seo.title: ChatGPT Bulk Delete — Clean Up Conversations Faster
seo.description: Select multiple ChatGPT conversations, choose them all at once, and delete them together with a lightweight Chrome extension.

hero.title: A cleaner ChatGPT history in a few clicks.
hero.subtitle: Select the conversations you no longer need, review your choice, and delete them together instead of one by one.

features.title: Select multiple chats
features.text: Choose exactly which conversations you want to remove from your history.

features.title: Select everything
features.text: Use Select All when you want to clear a longer list in one action.

features.title: Confirm before deleting
features.text: Review your selection before the extension starts the deletion process.

features.title: Fits into ChatGPT
features.text: A focused, lightweight interface that works directly with your conversation list.

privacy.title: Your conversations stay yours.
privacy.text: According to its Chrome Web Store privacy disclosure, ChatGPT Bulk Delete does not collect or use your data.
privacy.linkLabel: View the Chrome Web Store listing

footer.tagline: Take control of your ChatGPT conversation history.
footer.disclaimer: ChatGPT Bulk Delete is an independent extension and is not affiliated with OpenAI.
